title: ReSplash! - Splash text restored & curated
description:
Curated & revised "vanilla-plus" splash text list; Rewritten & culled new texts, restored & resurrected old texts. Splashes like somebody's splashed before!
It's the splashiest! Splashtastic?!
body:
![Large, bold gray text spelling the pack's title, "ReSplash!" with yellow splash text reading "It's totally adequate!" underneath.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/957e42665dac1e7ba24ee99e00cdb1bc093f9629.png)

# Wait, what?

**ReSplash** is a resource pack all about Minecraft-ifying Minecraft's splash text. Making it more Minecraft-y than Minecraft. You follow? No? That's fine.

Rather than copying an existing splashes.txt file, I transcribed every single splash off the wiki, one by one, an effort taking a few hours. I even accidentally duplicated "***Check it out!***" like Mojang did and then caught it.

# What's it change?

Below are all the splashes added and curated by ReSplash. 

In total, ReSplash has 400 splashes, compared to base Minecraft's 446.

Here's how to read the sections:

***Added splash!***

*Mojang splash!* -> ***ReSplash splash!***

## §1 - Reintroduced Splashes
<details>
<summary>Former splashes restored by ReSplash</summary>

### Indev era

***Better than Prey!***

*Moderately attractive!* -> ***Sexy!***

***Minors welcome!***

***Made by Notch!***

*It's finished!* -> ***When it's finished!*** (as the game is continuously updated)

### Alpha era

*Not as cool as Spock!* -> Now accompanied by the original ***Cooler than Spock!***

***Rude with two dudes with food!***

***Lewd with two dudes with food!*** (¿Por qué no los dos?)

*Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious!* -> ***Superfragilisticexpialidocious!***

***Woo, /v/!***

***Switches and ores!***

### Beta era

*"Autological" is!* -> ***"Noun" is an autonym!***

### Adventure era

***110813!***

***Totally forgot about Dre!***

***Hobo humping slobo babe!***

***Popping tags!***
</details>

## §2 - Revitalized Splashes
<details>
<summary>Former splashes restored and rewritten by ReSplash</summary>

### Indev era
*Pre-beta!* -> ***Out of beta!***

*Kind of dragon free!* -> ***Absolutely dragon free?*** (question mark is intentional)

*More than [n] sold!* -> All four (4000, 5000, 25000, 500) + a new one: ***More than 300000000 sold!***

*Now on OpenGL 3.3 core profile!* -> ***OpenGL 3.3!***

### Alpha era
*1% sugar!* -> now accompanied by ***0% sugar?*** (see "dragon free" splash)

*The Work of Notch!* -> ***The Work of Notch (and friends)!***

</details>

## §3 - Remixed Splashes
<details>
<summary>Extant splashes replaced or rewritten by ReSplash</summary>

### Beta era

*Twittered about!* -> now accompanied by ***Tweeted about!*** (F to pay respects)

### Adventure era

*Made by Jeb!* -> ***Made by Jeb, too!***

*Pumpakungen!* -> ***Pumpa kungen!***

*Colormatic* -> ***Colormatic!*** (added standard-yellow §e exclamation point)

*Java 16 + 1 + 4 = 21!* -> ***Now Java 21!*** // Updated to "Now Java 25!"

*HURNERJSGER?* -> ***HURNERJSGER!***

*Now contains 32 random daily cats!* -> ***Now with cats!*** (nuked social media in-joke)

*Now with Multiplayer!* -> now accompanied by ***Multiplayer!*** (matching *Singleplayer!* splash)

### Microsoft era

*More Digital!* -> ***Digital!***

*Thank you for the fish!* & *Thanks for the fish!* -> ***Thanks for all the fish!***

*All rumors are true!* -> ***All the rumors are true!***

*It came from space.* -> ***Made of star stuff!***

377-390 (Pandemic splashes) replaced ->
- ***Scrub, scrub, scrub 'til the water's brown!***
- ***Down with the Sickness!***

*Edit is a name!‌* -> ***"Edit" is a name!***

*Fabulous graphics!* -> ***Fabulous!***

408-415 (Social justice splashes) replaced ->
- ***Strives for more liberty!***
- ***Won't do what they told us!***
- ***Rufus Truthfist!***
- ***Do you not see the signs?!***
- ***Don't be racist, I am a building!***
- ***Did you know that you have rights?***
- ***No more oppression!***
- ***I've got an idea...World Peace!***

* Lines 435-439 condensed down to *I'm glad you're here!* & *Contains infinite genders!*

*Sniff sniff...* -> ***Really smells like dog buns!*** (Adventure Time, to go with the Bravest Warriors splash)

</details>

## §4 - Redacted Splashes
<details>
<summary>Extant splashes removed by ReSplash</summary>

### Adventure era

*Finally complete!*

All *Hello, [country]!* splashes, except for *日本ハロー！* 

(referencing the JP credits song of the Minecraft documentary)

*Don't feed avocados to parrots!*

*Plz reply to my tweet!*

*I have a suggestion.*

*Woah.*

*Ryan also has amazing hair!*

*pls rt*

*One day, somewhere in the future, my work will be quoted!* (No it won't)

*Now with additional stuff!*

*Extra things!*

*Yay, puppies for everyone!*

*Tougher than diamonds, rich like cream!*

*/give @a hugs 64*

*This is good for Realms.*

*Any computer is a laptop if you're brave enough!*

### Microsoft era

*doot doot*

*There's no stopping the Trollmaso*

*Throw yourself at the ground and miss*

*Rule #1: it's never my fault*

*Replaced molten cheese with blood?*

*Absolutely fixed relatively broken coordinates*

*Javalicious edition*

*You're going too fast!*

*Don't feed chocolate to parrots!*

*The true meaning of covfefe*

*Something funny!*

*Rainbow turtle?*

*I need more context.*

*Water bottle!*

*What's the question?*

*What do you expect?*

*Look mum, I'm in a splash!*

*Awesome game design right there!*

*Ph1lza had a good run!*

*10 years of Mining and Crafting!*

*Ping the human!*

*In case it isn't obvious, foxes aren't players.*

*Buzzy Bees!*

*Minecraft Java Edition presents: Disgusting Bugs*

*This parrot is no more! It has ceased to be!* (This...is an EX-SPLASH!)

*Honey, I grew the bees!*

*Find your claw!*

*Everybody do the Leif!*

*<3 Max & 99 & Ducky!*

*#minecraftfarms*

*Envision! Create! Share!*

*Also try Minecraft Dungeons!*

*Vanilla!*

*Zoglin!?*

*[this splash text is now available]*

*Home-made!*

*There's <<a cat on ,my keyboard!~*

*The cutest predator you'll ever meet!*

*Get to the coppah!*

*Board game version also available!*

*Honey, I waxed the copper!*

*Plant-based light sources!*

*Made by "real" people!*

*Shriek like a Sculk Shrieker!*

*Who let the frogs out?*

*RIBBIT!*

*Croak team!*

*Flower forest TM perfume*

*Hat Fridays!*

*Made with lave!*

*This sand is sus*

*Remember to brush your... ...teeth*

*Has working bookshelves!*

*Place hanging sign here*

*Joule is neat too!*

*Chicken Jockey!* (NOOO GOD!)

*Flint and Steel!* (NO GOD PLEASE NO. NO. NO!)

*Music by Hyper Potions!* (NOOOOOO-)
</details>

## §5 - Bedrock Splashes
<details>
<summary>Splashes imported from Bedrock Edition</summary>

***Glowing creepy eyes!***

***& Knuckles!***

***Mostly harmless!***

***Artisinal!***
</details>

## §6 - New Splashes?
<details>
<summary>I put these extra splashes into the pack, too!</summary>

***Agender!***

***Hello there!***

***Unparalleled!***

***Successor of the Chambered!***

***Order of the Stone!***

***Rana!***

***Miners welcome!***

***Ask your doctor!***

***Kind of Lootbox free!***

***VENGEAAAANCE!***

***Digging a hole!***

***Godspeed chicken!***

***Deserves ice cream!***

***Also try Infiniminer!***

***Also try Factorio!***

***Also try Rocket Arena 3!***

***Also try Cookie Clicker!***

***Justice for XaPhobia!***

***Justice for C418!***

***Fancy!***
</details>
